—White Knight, Sentinel Supreme[/i]

—Green Thumb, Phytomistress[/i]

—Red Hot, Blazing Streak[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Teamwork 3 [i](As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more.)[/i]
Draw two cards. If this spell was cast using teamwork, it deals damage to each opponent equal to the number of cards in your hand. Otherwise, it deals 2 damage to each opponent.

Deathtouch
[i]Alliance[/i] — Whenever another creature you control enters, target opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.
cards.flavor_text:
[i]“My mantle is a symbol of redemption. It's not enough to find it for myself, I will guide all those who want to leave the shadows.”
—Black Sheep, Shining Beacon[/i]

cards.rules_text:
This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.
{2}{W}{B}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains lifelink until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.
{2}{B}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. When it dies this turn, each opponent loses 2 life. Activate only as a sorcery.

This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G} or {W}.
{2}{G}{W}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains vigilance until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {U} or {R}.
{2}{U}{R}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. It gains menace until end of turn. Activate only as a sorcery.

This land enters tapped.
{T}: Add {G} or {U}.
{2}{G}{U}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Put a +1/+1 counter on each of one or two target creatures. Activate only as a sorcery.

Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 4 or greater, put two +1/+1 counters on target land you control. If that spell had mana value 8 or greater, double the number of +1/+1 counters on that land.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
{T}: Target land you control becomes a 0/0 Elemental creature with vigilance and haste until end of turn. It's still a land. Activate only as a sorcery.

Deathtouch, lifelink
Whenever Black Sheep deals combat damage to an opponent, put target creature card from that player's graveyard onto the battlefield tapped under your control. That creature is a Hero in addition to its other types and gains “If this creature would die, put it on the bottom of its owner's library instead.”

Double strike, menace, haste
Whenever you attack for the first time each turn, untap each creature you control with first strike, double strike, flash, menace, haste, or tactical. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

Vigilance, lifelink
You and other creatures you control have hexproof.
White Knight assigns combat damage equal to her toughness rather than her power.

Indestructible
{T}: Add {B}.
{6}{B}, {T}, Exile a creature you control: Harness The Terminus of Return. [i](Once harnessed, its Origin ability is active.)[/i]
Origin — At the beginning of your upkeep, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

Indestructible
{T}: Add {W}.
{5}{W}, {T}: Harness The Terminus of Apparition. [i](Once harnessed, its Origin ability is active.)[/i]
Origin — At the beginning of your end step, exile up to one other target nonland permanent you control, then return that card to the battlefield under its owner's control.

You may have Kavaero enter as a copy of any creature card in a graveyard, except his name is Kavaero, Mind-Bitten and he's a 4/4 Spider Human Hero in addition to his other types. When you do, exile that card.

Deathtouch, lifelink
Whenever Egrix attacks, until end of turn you may look at the top card of your library any time and you may play cards from the top of your library. If you cast a spell this way, pay life equal to its mana value rather than pay its mana cost.

When Verilax enters, if he was cast, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.
If damage would be dealt to Verilax, prevent that damage and put that many +1/+1 counters on him.

Trample
Whenever you cast a creature spell with mana value equal to Druneth's power, copy that spell, except the copy isn't legendary. Then put a +1/+1 counter on Druneth. [i](The copy becomes a token.)[/i]

Flying
You don't lose unspent red mana as steps and phases end.
Whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, add {R}.
When Bayo leaves the battlefield, you may pay {X}. When you do, he deals X damage to target player.

Vigilance, lifelink
When Withar enters, you may exchange your life total with target opponent. If you lose life this way, draw that many cards.
Return up to six target creature cards with different names from your graveyard to the battlefield.
Whenever a nontoken creature you control deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it, except it isn't legendary.

Convoke [i](Your creatures can help cast this spell. Each creature you tap while casting this spell pays for {1} or one mana of that creature's color.)[/i]
At the beginning of combat on your turn, look at the top five cards of your library. You may put a creature card from among them onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

First strike
Players can't gain life.
Damage can't be prevented.
Whenever a creature blocks, Lady Gore deals 1 damage to that creature's controller.

The Immense enters with X +1/+1 counters on it.
Whenever The Immense deals combat damage to a player, draw a card. Then if the number of cards in your hand is greater than its power, put a +1/+1 counter on The Immense.

Defender, haste
{T}, Discard a card: Draw a card.
{T}, Discard a blue card: Untap two other target nonland permanents you control.
{T}, Discard a red card: Create a tapped Treasure token.

Whenever you sacrifice another nontoken creature, create a 1/1 white Citizen creature token.
Exhaust — Tap 10 untapped creatures you control: Your life total becomes equal to twice your starting life total. [i](Activate each exhaust ability only once.)[/i]

cards.rules_text:
Creatures you control with no abilities get +1/+1.
When this creature enters, up to one other target creature loses all abilities and becomes a Cleric creature with base power and toughness 3/3.

Weftwalker can't be blocked.
When Weftwalker enters, exile up to one other target nonland permanent until she leaves the battlefield.
Whenever one or more permanents are exiled from the battlefield, put that many +1/+1 counters on Weftwalker.

You may have Faceless enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield or any creature card in a graveyard, except it's a Hero in addition to its other types and it has “Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, create a token that's a copy of it except it's a 1/1 and doesn't have this ability.”

This spell can't be countered.
Trample
Whenever Godsclaw enters or attacks, discover 4. [i](Exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value 4 or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)[/i]

If a spell or ability an opponent controls causes you to discard this card, put it onto the battlefield instead of putting it into your graveyard.
Moon Mad attacks each turn if able.
Creature spells and abilities of creature sources you control can't be countered.

During your turn, Acrobat has first strike and flying.
Noncreature spells cost {1} more to cast.
